title: lychnophora rosmarinus
intro: Lychnophora rosmarinus, also known as "erva limão" or "lemon verbena of the fields", is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Lychnophora rosmarinus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
